mapper.select:
SELECT co.id, co.checkout_no, co.customer_id, co.checkout_date, co.reason, co.operator, co.create_time, co.update_time, c.name AS customer_name FROM check_out co LEFT JOIN customer c ON co.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE co.deleted = 0
AND (co.checkout_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY co.create_time DESC
